prompt: TEST FIXTURE — a deliberately cyclic epic manifest. Shape-valid (passes flow-epic-manifest-schema) but contains a dependency cycle a -> b -> a so flow-epic-dag rejects it. Used by bin/epic-designer-example.test.ts to prove F4's reliance on the DAG gate; NOT a real epic.

features.title: Feature A (cycle member)
features.description: Deliberately depends on b to form the cycle a -> b -> a.

features.title: Feature B (cycle member)
features.description: Deliberately depends on a to form the cycle a -> b -> a.
